# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.EnableVolumeAttenuation property

When enabled, volume is attenuated based on inner / outer radius and the chosen attenuation function.

Note: This overrides Godot's built-in distance attenuation model at runtime so there is no doulbe-falloff.

```csharp
public bool EnableVolumeAttenuation { get; set; }
```
